headline: How The Hubbell (HUBB) Investment Story Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Targets And New Guidance
summary: Hubbell’s fair value estimate in this model has been nudged higher to about US$535.77 from roughly US$532.85, a small 0.5% adjustment that still matters if you are watching price targets closely. Across Wall Street, some firms have lifted targets, including one move to US$565 from US$515, while at least one has cut, which underscores how divided analysts are after the recent rerating. Read on to see what is behind these shifts and how you can track the evolving Hubbell story from here. Stay...
